items.title: Muhammad Taaha
items.subtitle: Software Engineer & Student
items.description: Computer Science student at FAST-NUCES (GPA: 3.52/4.00) with a passion for building scalable systems and solving complex problems. Dean's List recipient and top 10% on LeetCode. Interested in distributed systems, network programming, and creating tools that make a difference.

items.title: Education
items.subtitle: Academic Journey
items.description: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences (FAST-NUCES), Karachi. Expected graduation: 2027. Certified in Python Fundamentals (Microsoft) and Data Analysis (IBM) via Coursera.

items.title: Certifications
items.subtitle: Professional Development
items.description: Python Fundamentals by Microsoft and Data Analysis by IBM, both completed via Coursera. Continuously expanding knowledge through online courses and industry certifications.

items.title: Technical Skills
items.subtitle: Tech Stack & Tools
items.description: Proficient in Python, JavaScript, SQL, C/C++, Java, and x86 Assembly. Experienced with React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Flask, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, Git, and Linux. Strong foundation in distributed systems, network programming, REST APIs, and RBAC.

items.title: Soft Skills
items.subtitle: Beyond Code
items.description: Strong communicator with experience in technical writing, team leadership, and cross-functional collaboration. Published writer on Medium, organizer of large-scale events, and mentor to junior developers.
